LanguageData.ParaCondRed.label: parallel conduit (Red)
LanguageData.ParaCondRed.description: A parallel set of electrical cables for moving power around. Can be placed under walls and other buildings.
LanguageData.ParaCondBlue.label: parallel conduit (Blue)
LanguageData.ParaCondBlue.description: A parallel set of electrical cables for moving power around. Can be placed under walls and other buildings.
LanguageData.ParaCondGreen.label: parallel conduit (Green)
LanguageData.ParaCondGreen.description: A parallel set of electrical cables for moving power around. Can be placed under walls and other buildings.
LanguageData.ParaCondSocket.label: parallel conduit Socket
LanguageData.ParaCondSocket.description: A Socket that can be used to connect parallel conduits to normal conduits. Can be placed under walls and other buildings.
LanguageData.ParaCondSocketRed.label: parallel conduit socket (red)
LanguageData.ParaCondSocketRed.description: A Socket that can be used to connect red parallel conduits to normal conduits. Can be placed under walls and other buildings.
LanguageData.ParaCondSocketBlue.label: parallel conduit socket (blue)
LanguageData.ParaCondSocketBlue.description: A Socket that can be used to connect blue parallel conduits to normal conduits. Can be placed under walls and other buildings.
LanguageData.ParaCondSocketGreen.label: parallel conduit socket (green)
LanguageData.ParaCondSocketGreen.description: A Socket that can be used to connect parallel conduits to normal conduits. Can be placed under walls and other buildings.
LanguageData.ParaBatteryRed.label: battery parallel red
LanguageData.ParaBatteryRed.description: Stores electricity on a parallel grid when there is excess power and yields it when there is not. Warning - charged batteries tend to explode when exposed to rain or fire.
LanguageData.ParaBatteryBlue.label: battery parallel blue
LanguageData.ParaBatteryBlue.description: Stores electricity on a parallel grid when there is excess power and yields it when there is not. Warning - charged batteries tend to explode when exposed to rain or fire.
LanguageData.ParaBatteryGreen.label: battery parallel green
LanguageData.ParaBatteryGreen.description: Stores electricity on a parallel grid when there is excess power and yields it when there is not. Warning - charged batteries tend to explode when exposed to rain or fire.
